title: BEM-921 worker request
objective:
Create file governance/audit/mailbox/to_curator/BEM921_SYSTEM_PROTOCOL_V2_REQUEST.md with content # BEM-921 SYSTEM PROTOCOL V2 REQUEST
Status: SENT_TO_CURATOR
Route: External GPT auditor -> Curator -> Worker -> Curator -> external mailbox
Objective: prepare a new full-system protocol version for evolving the system to working state, incorporating all operator decisions and Claude requirements from today.
Mandatory corrections from operator:
- Protocol must be full-system, not Telegram-only.
- Workspace belongs to internal contour, not individual element.
- Main workspace is the approved main repository code/state.
- Curator is a role and element of object, not an internal contour member by default.
- Curators inherit system + object + channel rules; internal contour elements inherit system + object + contour rules/properties.
- Elements must not have local individual rules by default; behavior is typical role prompt + inherited rules + contour properties + experience registry.
- Vertical communication is between object curators.
- Input to internal contour is Curator -> Analyst.
- Internal contour algorithm is iterative: Analyst prepares proposal -> Auditor approves/rejects -> if approved Executor executes -> Executor reports to Auditor -> Auditor approves result or returns through Analyst for revision; repeat until auditor-approved result.
- Output from internal contour is Auditor -> Curator.
- Horizontal contour communication is Auditor of contour A -> Analyst of contour B, or Analyst B requests verified data from Auditor A.
- GitHub Actions/runners are mechanisms for role/contour activation and proof, not roles.
- Event log and managed channel must record each transition.
- Telegram can exist for any registered curator; main top-level route is GD Curator, and all Telegram reports use canonical format and operator-selected period default 1 hour.
Claude requirements to include:
- elements_registry.json, element prompts, object-to-elements refs.
- release_proof_manifest commit_sha non-null from CI/Git.
- dispatch consumer auto-trigger.
- telegram_input_envelope_schema and mapping.
- managed channel consumer.
- BEM-925 deterministic runner PASS definition.
- E2E mock_status/production_status split.
- concurrency groups for core workflows.
- report_period_config owner OPERATOR and version.
- BEM-923 secret names without values.
- BEM-928 checklist before assembly.
Required output:
- Updated full system protocol, DOCX-ready.
- Detailed roadmap BEM-920..BEM-928 or renumbered implementation sequence.
- Full prompt section with content drafts, not only prompt names.
- Separate tables for existing prompts and new prompts for operator approval.
- Acceptance criteria and proofs for each phase.
Worker must verify coherence and flag contradictions.
Expected status: APPROVED_WITH_NOTES or BLOCKED_WITH_REASON.
No issue comments.
